name: LineStyles
summary: Provides access to the different line style objects in the model.

methods.summary: The #[] method lets you retrieve a line style by name or index.
methods.remarks: The #[] method lets you retrieve a line style by name or index. The #at method is an alias of #[].

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the line style to retrieve.

returns.doc: The line style retrieved. nil if the name couldn't be retrieved.

throws.when: If index is out of bounds.

methods.summary: The #[] method lets you retrieve a line style by name or index.
methods.remarks: The #[] method lets you retrieve a line style by name or index. The #at method is an alias of #[].

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the line style to retrieve.

returns.doc: The line style retrieved. nil if the name couldn't be retrieved.

throws.when: If index is out of bounds.

methods.name: each
methods.summary: The #each method is used to iterate through all the line styles.
methods.remarks: The #each method is used to iterate through all the line styles.

methods.name: names
methods.summary: The #names method return the support line styles as strings.
methods.remarks: The #names method return the support line styles as strings.

methods.name: size
methods.signature: size => Integer Also known as: length
methods.summary: The #size method returns the number of line styles that SketchUp supports.
methods.remarks: The #size method returns the number of line styles that SketchUp supports.

methods.name: to_a
methods.summary: The #to_a method returns an array of all the line styles.
methods.remarks: The #to_a method returns an array of all the line styles.

returns.doc: Containing all the line style objects.
